name: Yuki
message: "All right, we're ready to go!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Ready!"

name: Yuki
message: "What about you, Tomosane?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, sure..."

name: Yuki
message: "You duummyy."

name: Tomosane
message: "Ow, ow! What are you hitting me for?!"

name: Yuki
message: "You're spacing out! Are you underestimating the ocean or what?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Why do you think I'm spacing out? Come on, we haven't even left yet."

name: Yuki
message: "We have to be prepared, just like the knights of old! Unguard!"

name: Yuki
message: "Do you understand?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Not at all..."

name: Yuki
message: "You dummy!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't hit me every time I say something!"

name: Yuki
message: "What? You were just telling me to stop taking it easy on you before. Make up your mind already."

name: Yuki
message: "Everyone knows that you have to be unguard at all times to protect yourself! That's one of the fundamentals, so remember it well!"

name: Tomosane
message: "I have no idea what you're talking about, but I'm pretty sure that's supposed to be en garde, not unguard."

name: Yuki
message: "Anyway, if you underestimate the ocean, you'll be in trouble. Big trouble!"

name: Tomosane
message: "I think you're the one who'll be in trouble."

name: Yuki
message: "What do you think, Hasaki-chan? Shouldn't he respect the ocean a bit more?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I-If you're not careful, you can get in a lot of trouble, I think."

name: Yuki
message: "Look! You're the one who's going to be in trouble, Tomosane."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, I'm not underestimating it or anything."

name: Yuki
message: "Then let's do this one more time! Everyone ready?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Ready!"

name: Yuki
message: "What about Tomosane?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, I'm ready."

name: Yuki
message: "All right! Let's go!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Why do you have so much luggage, anyway?"

name: Yuki
message: "Because the ocean is scary!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, okay."
I knew it wasn't worth the effort to argue with her.
Yuki-nee attached the luggage carrier to her bicycle and started pedaling.
Good luck getting that carrier home.

name: Yuki
message: "Wow, the beaches here in Sawaimura are great. It's like we have our own private beach."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's probably only because no one would want to come to a beach out in the country."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, it's a pretty far drive for most people."

name: Tomosane
message: "More importantly... Yuki-nee, where are we going to change?"

name: Yuki
message: "Hehehe, look at this!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey, you dummy, we're still in public!"

name: Yuki
message: "Were you surprised?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "I have my swimsuit on underneath."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh... You shouldn't just lift your skirt up like that, though."

name: Yuki
message: "Why not? I have a swimsuit on, so it's fine."

name: Tomosane
message: "What about Hasaki?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I need to change."

name: Yuki
message: "Here, I brought a poncho."

name: Tomosane
message: "A poncho? What's that?"

name: Yuki
message: "They wear these in South America. It's a big piece of fabric with a hole for your head. They sell them for people to use when they're changing."

name: Tomosane
message: "I see..."

name: Yuki
message: "You'll probably just go behind a rock and change or something, right Tomosane?"

name: Tomosane
message: "No way."

name: Yuki
message: "Tadaa!
How's it look?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't ask me."

name: Yuki
message: "Jeez, you're so boring. This is my new swimsuit, you know."

name: Tomosane
message: "What did you expect me to say?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, Hasaki-chan, did you finish getting changed?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Uh, yeah..."

name: Hasaki
message: "H-How is it?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't ask me..."

name: Hasaki
message: "D-Does it look bad?"

name: Yuki
message: "You dumbass!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-What's your problem?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Are you really her big brother? Or has it been that long since a girl asked you to compliment her?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-Yeah..."

name: Yuki
message: "Can't you say something better than that, Tomosane?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I told you, you're expecting way too much."

name: Yuki
message: "Hasaki-chan is younger than you, dummy. Don't make excuses now. It's your responsibility."

name: Tomosane
message: "R-Really?"

name: Yuki
message: "You're her big brother, and you picked out that swimsuit for her, too."

name: Yuki
message: "I put down some real dosh for that swimsuit you picked out!"
Now what's she talking about? It's not like I made her buy it.
She must be mad since it was so expensive.

name: Yuki
message: "Did you say something?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I-I didn't say anything!"

name: Yuki
message: "It's written all over your face."
She's way too perceptive.

name: Hasaki
message: "Um, Tomo Nii-san..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Now you're just being annoying, Hasaki."

name: Hasaki
message: "A-Auh..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I picked out that swimsuit because I thought it looked good on you! You don't have to ask me every time you wear it!"

name: Tomosane
message: "I-It looks good on you... Don't worry!"

name: Hasaki
message: "R-Really?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, really. Don't make me say it again."

name: Hasaki
message: "Okay. Thanks, Tomo Nii-san!"

name: Yuki
message: "What about me?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Like I care."

name: Yuki
message: "Whoa, that's cold!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh well. Good for you, Hasaki-chan."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, thank you too, Yuki-san."

name: Yuki
message: "That's right. You better be thankful. That swimsuit was pretty dang expensive."

name: Hasaki
message: "A-Auh... Thank you..."
Yuki-nee, that's really petty.
You're not supposed to talk about money with little kids.

name: Yuki
message: "All right then, come on! We're at the beach!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Thanks for stating the obvious. We've been at the beach for a while now."

name: Yuki
message: "Duuummyy!"

name: Tomosane
message: "What'd you hit me for that time?!"

name: Yuki
message: "You'll die if you keep saying stupid crap like that, Tomosane!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh? Why would I die?"

name: Yuki
message: "Hasaki-chan would be really sad if Tomosane died, huh?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? Tomo Nii-san is gonna die? Huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "Look, I told you! Now she's crying!"

name: Tomosane
message: "You're the one who made her cry, though."

name: Yuki
message: "You dummy!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't hit me!"

name: Yuki
message: "Then dodge it. I've been testing you this whole time, you know? You always say you want to fight me, so I was just testing whether you were up to it."

name: Yuki
message: "Now then, let's do some warm-up exercises before we go swimming. Gotta limber up!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Limber up?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, yeah, we're gonna stretch. Here, I'll show you how. It's kind of like a dance."

name: Tomosane
message: "You're gonna dance?"

name: Yuki
message: "First, put your hand like this!"

name: Tomosane
message: "My hand? Like this?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, then put your palms facing down, about level with your chin. Then swing your hands over to the right."

name: Tomosane
message: "S-Sure..."

name: Hasaki
message: "I did it!"

name: Yuki
message: "All right, let's go."

name: Yuki
message: "Stretch!
Stretch!
Reach out to the sky!"

name: Yuki
message: "To the end of the sky!"

name: Tomosane
message: "What is this crap?"

name: Yuki
message: "Shut up and do it!"

name: Yuki
message: "All right!
Stretch!
Stretch!
Reach out to the sky!
To the end of the sky!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Stretch!
Stretch!
Reach out to the sky!
To the end of the sky!"

name: Tomosane
message: "S-Stretch, stretch, reach out to the end of the sky."

name: Yuki
message: "Then shake your hips back and forth!"

name: Yuki
message: "To the right?"

name: Yuki
message: "To the left?"

name: Yuki
message: "To live?"

name: Yuki
message: "Or to die?"

name: Yuki
message: "Will tomorrow come?"

name: Yuki
message: "Look to the sky!"

name: Yuki
message: "Here we go again!"

name: Yuki
message: "All right!
All right!"

name: Yuki
message: "Stretch!
Stretch!
Reach out to the sky!"

name: Tomosane
message: "What's the point of this?!
Do some normal stretches already!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, come on. I'm sure our older fans could appreciate that one."

name: Tomosane
message: "Not like you have any fans."

name: Hasaki
message: "Stretch!
Stretch!
Reach out to the sky!
To the end of the sky!"

name: Tomosane
message: "You should just forget that, Hasaki. It's just some weird dance."

name: Yuki
message: "But it's so fun. Only our older fans will get it, though."

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you even talking about? I don't get it."

name: Yuki
message: "All right, let's swim!"

name: Tomosane
message: "What do you have that board for?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh? You don't know what a surfboard is?"

name: Tomosane
message: "No, that's not what I was asking. Why did you bring something like that?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yuki-nee is now departing for the deep blue sea. I'll leave Hasaki-chan in your hands."

name: Tomosane
message: "Aren't you supposed to be the adult here?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Right now I am, but I'm going out to sea, so you're in charge until I get back!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Jeez, you just got done telling me about how the sea is a scary place, and now you're leaving two children alone?"

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahaha, so now you want me to treat you like a child?
I thought you said you were an adult?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wha―!"

name: Yuki
message: "Sometimes there are freak waves, so watch out. You might think it's just a little wave, and then a huge one comes out of nowhere."

name: Tomosane
message: "A-All right, but..."

name: Yuki
message: "What's wrong, Tomosane? You can look after Hasaki-chan, right? You're an adult, after all."

name: Tomosane
message: "Jeez, this is the only time you call me an adult."

name: Yuki
message: "Anyway, you should talk to her. I'm pretty sure she wishes she could talk to you more."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki-nee..."

name: Yuki
message: "Be ambitious, my boy. I'll see you later. Say hi to the ambassadors for me! Especially that Magma guy, and Ambassador Shoutoku too."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki-nee..."
C'mon, Yuki-nee...
Prince Shoutoku wasn't even an ambassador.
She messed that joke up so bad, I don't even know where to start.

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san."

name: Tomosane
message: "What do you want to do, Hasaki? We're here at the beach, so let's play. I don't mind playing with you today."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, um, well, there's lots and lots of things we can do!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, whatever you want."

name: Hasaki
message: "A-Auh... N-No, Tomo Nii-san, not there..."

name: Tomosane
message: "It'll be okay. Look, I almost got it in there."

name: Hasaki
message: "A-Ah... If you touch it like that, you'll break it..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Whoa. It's so wet."

name: Hasaki
message: "Waaaah... B-But you were rushing me..."

name: Tomosane
message: "All right. I just need to get a little further in."

name: Hasaki
message: "N-No, Tomo Nii-san, ah, auhh!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hmm... It just won't go in."

name: Hasaki
message: "N-No, wait... If you push it in like that, it'll break..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't worry. Leave it to your big brother."

name: Hasaki
message: "A-Aaaahh!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Look, you broke it..."

name: Tomosane
message: "H-Huh? It fell apart."

name: Hasaki
message: "It's cuz you were digging too fast. You have to slow down when you're making the tunnels."

name: Tomosane
message: "But it'll get destroyed if we don't hurry up and finish before the tides comes in."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, it was dry here before, but now the sand is getting wet. If you dig down a little bit, there's water."

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, I should've picked a better spot I guess. I didn't think the tide was going to come in this far."

name: Hasaki
message: "Let's make another one over there."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, we just need to find a better spot."

name: Tomosane
message: "Let's make a real big one this time."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah."
The first thing she wanted to do when she came to the beach wasn't to swim. She just wanted to play in the sand. It was no different than playing in the sandbox in the park.
I remember I played in a sandbox with Hasaki once before, when we were in Tokyo.
We were both a lot younger back then.

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey, Hasaki, I know I haven't seen you in a long time, but have you been okay while I was gone?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Y-Yeah... I guess..."
I heard the hesitation in her voice.

name: Tomosane
message: "Is that woman still alive?"

name: Hasaki
message: "You shouldn't call her 'that woman.' She's our mom, you know?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, I know."
That's right.
To me, that woman is just a traitor. But to Hasaki, she's still Mom.
Even though that woman is disturbed.

name: Tomosane
message: "How's Takuji doing?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, uh... You don't have to talk about it if you don't want to."

name: Hasaki
message: "Takuji Nii-san is always studying. He does a lot of sports too."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, really... Same as ever, huh?"

name: Hasaki
message: "He said he's had to work himself to death ever since I was born."

name: Tomosane
message: "I told you, that's wrong!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, sorry. I didn't mean to yell at you. Sorry."

name: Hasaki
message: "Thanks."

name: Hasaki
message: "I think I kind of forgot what you were like, Tomo Nii-san. But now I think I remember you."

name: Tomosane
message: "Ahaha, you remembered I was a mean guy back then too?"

name: Hasaki
message: "No, I don't remember that at all."

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san, you were the only person who was on my side."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh? R-Really?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah!"

name: Tomosane
message: "B-But Dad is there too."

name: Hasaki
message: "Dad isn't just on my side. He does try to be nice to me, though."

name: Tomosane
message: "W-Well, yeah. But you know, I might not always be on your side, either."

name: Hasaki
message: "Really?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, of course. I just try to be true to myself."

name: Hasaki
message: "What does that mean?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, if something bothers me, then I'll say that. It doesn't matter if it's my parents or what, I won't just accept the way things are. I'll fight back if I have to... That's all."

name: Hasaki
message: "R-Really?"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's why I said I might not always be on your side. I'm just a selfish brother."

name: Hasaki
message: "A selfish brother..."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's right. I hate the cult that brainwashed that stupid woman. The world's going to end? That's just ridiculous."

name: Hasaki
message: "They said 2012, right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's right. They were talking about how the world was going to be destroyed a few years back, too."

name: Hasaki
message: "When?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, right. That was around the time you were born, I think."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, really... I didn't know that."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, it was a long time ago. Nothing actually happened, though."

name: Tomosane
message: "They've been predicting the end of the world since the time of the cavemen, but it still hasn't happened, not even once."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's why the prophecy is just a lie. They say it's your fault Takuji couldn't be the savior, but that's just a load of crap."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah..."

name: Tomosane
message: "What, don't you believe me?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah, that's not what I meant. I believe you. You're right."

name: Tomosane
message: "But it doesn't really sound like you believe me."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, uh... Huh? I wonder why..."
Why would she have to wonder? She either does or she doesn't.
Though Hasaki has been told those lies ever since she was born.
I guess I see why she would have trouble accepting it's a lie after all these years.
Either way, Hasaki thinks that she made her Mom, Dad, and brother unhappy because she was born.

name: Tomosane
message: "Think of it this way, Hasaki."

name: Hasaki
message: "Hm?"

name: Tomosane
message: "If he's the savior, then I'm your hero!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Hero?"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's right. He might save the world. Well, I'm pretty sure he won't."

name: Hasaki
message: "Ahaha."

name: Tomosane
message: "But if he's going to save the world, then I've gotta be the hero who protects you."

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san? You're my hero?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, I'm a superhero in disguise."

name: Hasaki
message: "You can transform?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, I totally can. I can turn into Gangaru, Atranger, and even Cyroid."

name: Hasaki
message: "What about Pretty Cure?"

name: Tomosane
message: "No way."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, okay..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wait, uh, i-if you really want, I could probably transform into that."

name: Hasaki
message: "What about Sailor Moon?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, uh... Y-Yeah, I could do that. I'm your big brother, you know, so maybe just for you... I'll think about it..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Really?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, really."

name: Tomosane
message: "Remember this... If Takuji is the savior, then I'm the hero."

name: Tomosane
message: "I'll stand up to protect you any time you're in trouble."

name: Tomosane
message: "When you're in trouble, you can just think of it as a performance."

name: Hasaki
message: "A performance?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, of course. A performance. A hero is someone who turns a bad situation into an opportunity."

name: Hasaki
message: "Someone who turns a bad situation into an opportunity? A hero?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, I'm your hero. No matter what happens to the world, I'll protect you! V for Victory!"

name: Hasaki
message: "T-Tomo Nii-san... You're so cool."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, your big brother is really cool."

name: Hasaki
message: "Okay. I believe in you, Tomo Nii-san. You'll come back to save me, no matter what kind of trouble I'm in."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, the only problem is with the performance."

name: Tomosane
message: "But the ending will be more exciting that way, right?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, of course!"

name: Tomosane
message: "So even if bad things happen, you'll be okay. We'll sit and laugh after it's all over."

name: Tomosane
message: "Because you have a hero here to protect you!"

name: Yuki
message: "Tomosane!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey, whoa!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-Why do you have seaweed on your head? And what happened to your swimsuit?"

name: Yuki
message: "It got swept away with the tide... It wasn't a good idea to go surfing in a bikini."

name: Tomosane
message: "R-Really?"

name: Yuki
message: "Waaah. I usually wear a wetsuit when I go swimming, but I wanted to wear a bikini since I came to the beach with you, and it ended up getting washed away!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Then why don't you come play with us instead of surfing?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, come on! I was trying to be a considerate big sister for you guys. You two haven't had any alone time since you got here."

name: Yuki
message: "It's not like I actually wanted to go out in the ocean alone. I wanted to play with Hasaki-chan, too."

name: Tomosane
message: "You liar. I saw you having fun out there."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, there's no wind today, so the waves are beautiful. You just have to ride it like a rollercoaster. You can feel the wave cresting behind you."

name: Tomosane
message: "So you were having fun! I don't know all those technical terms, either."

name: Yuki
message: "Waaah! But now I'm bummed 'cause I lost my top..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, yeah. Go put a shirt on, will you?"

name: Yuki
message: "Waaah, I guess I will."

name: Tomosane
message: "So... what are you doing here now?"

name: Yuki
message: "What's wrong? Come on, let me build something."

name: Tomosane
message: "Jeez, what're you gonna build?"

name: Yuki
message: "Cinderella's castle."

name: Tomosane
message: "How are you gonna make that?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Then what are you making, Tomosane?"

name: Tomosane
message: "A really cool gundam!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh... S-So that's what you were trying to make."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh? Can't you tell?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I-I was trying to make... a castle..."

name: Yuki
message: "See, I told you!"

name: Tomosane
message: "I-I guess..."
I was hoping that Hasaki would understand how cool heroes in disguise are, since she thought it was cool when I told her I would be her hero.
Damn... No such luck, huh?

name: Yuki
message: "So let's make a castle. I'll get the concrete ready."

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you going to do with concrete?"

name: Yuki
message: "Don't worry about that. Come on, Hasaki, let's do it."

name: Hasaki
message: "Y-Yeah..."

name: Yuki
message: "So? What kind of castle do you wanna build?"

name: Tomosane
message: "An evil castle, right? Dracula's castle."

name: Yuki
message: "Who cares about that guy? Don't you think Cinderella's castle sounds like more fun?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah... I want Cinderella's castle."

name: Tomosane
message: "What kind of castle did Cinderella have, anyway?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I think it had a bunch of towers and stuff on it."

name: Tomosane
message: "A bunch of watchtowers?"
Well, they did call it an impenetrable fortress. I guess that sounds about right.

name: Yuki
message: "All right, get to work on your side, guys."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah."

name: Yuki
message: "I can't wait to get started."

name: Tomosane
message: "An impenetrable fortress... Well..."

name: Yuki
message: "It's done... Whoa?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "What's that on top?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I mean, this is what I think the castle should look like."

name: Yuki
message: "What the hell is it?"

name: Yuki
message: "Avert your eyes, children. You shouldn't look at this."

name: Yuki
message: "All right, let's head home. You didn't forget anything, right?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Nope."

name: Tomosane
message: "All right, let's go."

name: Yuki
message: "Okay, but remember we're not out of danger yet, so don't let your guard down."

name: Tomosane
message: "Sounds like we're in for it..."
I guess the danger didn't end at the sea.
Maybe a tidal wave will hit and pull us back into the water.
That would be a real disaster.
Yuki-nee pedalled the bike, pulling a luggage carrier with all our things.
Not only our luggage, but also Hasaki's bike and Hasaki herself.
Riding uphill, at that.
I was kind of surprised.
She had no trouble pedalling the bike.
It was all downhill on the way over, but now we have to go back up those very same hills.
But I guess that doesn't matter to Yuki-nee.

name: Yuki
message: "Here we are...
Ahaha, Hasaki-chan fell asleep."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, I'm pretty sure this is the first time she's gotten to play like this, you know?"

name: Yuki
message: "Really?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You've heard people here at the dojo talk about our family before, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, well... Just rumors, really."

name: Yuki
message: "Especially about Sanami Kotomi-san... Oh, sorry, that's her old name. Now she's Mamiya Kotomi."

name: Yuki
message: "She was famous in this village."

name: Tomosane
message: "That woman... My mother, what is she? Why does everyone pay attention to her?"

name: Yuki
message: "What is she? Well, she's still just human..."

name: Yuki
message: "I'm pretty sure it was before I was born, but one of the nearby villages became a ghost town."

name: Tomosane
message: "A village?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, it was really underpopulated. But around here, it's still pretty famous."

name: Tomosane
message: "A famous village?"

name: Yuki
message: "There's a shrine there. I hear it's called Sanagi Shrine."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, it's an old legend, so I don't actually know much about it, but people say that the souls of all the people that die in this area gather at that shrine."

name: Yuki
message: "They say there's an enormous hole under the spot where the shrine was built, and the hole is actually a path to the underworld."

name: Tomosane
message: "Is that true?"

name: Yuki
message: "Doesn't it sound like a lie?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I guess so."

name: Yuki
message: "Like I said, it's just an old superstition."

name: Yuki
message: "Something ridiculous like that can't actually exist."

name: Yuki
message: "Kotomi-san was born at that shrine."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, I've heard about that. It's supposed to be some kind of weird shrine where they practice the occult."

name: Yuki
message: "The occult, huh? Well, that part might be true."

name: Yuki
message: "People in this area believe that the women from that shrine can control the dead."

name: Tomosane
message: "But can they?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's my question. Tomosane, have you ever seen your mother controlling a dead person?"

name: Tomosane
message: "No, never."

name: Yuki
message: "I guess not."

name: Yuki
message: "So it's just superstition."

name: Yuki
message: "The truth is probably that Kotomi-san has no special powers, but people in this village are weak to old superstitions."

name: Tomosane
message: "Everyone believes it..."

name: Yuki
message: "Maybe not everyone. I don't know what they all believe, but it's definitely a bit creepy to think even some of them believe that's true."

name: Yuki
message: "It's no coincidence that she married into the Mamiya household, a family of traditional martial artists and Shinto practitioners here in Sawaimura."

name: Tomosane
message: "You think?"

name: Yuki
message: "Do you remember Grandpa Mamiya? The one that died a few years ago?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, but he died right after I moved here, so I don't really remember him. I heard he was the strongest person in the dojo."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, he was incredibly strong. I watched an exhibition match once, but my dad got beat up in a few seconds."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh? Your dad was in an exhibition match?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, but this guy was on a different level."

name: Tomosane
message: "But it was just an exhibition, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "If you fight a man like that, you fight to the death. Of course it was an exhibition."

name: Tomosane
message: "To the death?"

name: Yuki
message: "My dad was really stupid, so he came and tried to challenge the whole dojo when he was younger."

name: Yuki
message: "After that, he swore to never fight Grandpa Mamiya outside of an exhibition match ever again."

name: Tomosane
message: "The old man was really that strong, huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "He was born before the war, you know? He went to the mainland during the war, and he fought and killed more people than you could count."

name: Tomosane
message: "But he was such a small man."

name: Yuki
message: "When he faced an opponent, he knew everything."

name: Tomosane
message: "Knew everything?"

name: Yuki
message: "What kind of attack would come next, what the opponent was thinking..."

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you talking about? That sounds like magic."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, yeah. It does, but that's what I've heard."

name: Yuki
message: "Something happened a long time ago, when my dad stayed here as an apprentice."

name: Yuki
message: "In the middle of the night, the old man yelled and woke everyone up."

name: Yuki
message: "It was amazing. He yelled, 'What the hell are you doing?! There are rats eating our rice cakes, you fools!'"

name: Tomosane
message: "His hearing was good, then."

name: Yuki
message: "Good doesn't even describe it. He was sleeping in another building. He wasn't even close to the dojo."

name: Tomosane
message: "R-Really?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, really. I've heard a lot of other stories like that too."

name: Tomosane
message: "So he really was that strong."
I only have a fuzzy memory of him.

name: Yuki
message: "Traditional martial arts were passed down by Shinto practitioners, so the Mamiya family might have some element of spiritual power in their martial arts."

name: Tomosane
message: "By spiritual power, you really mean superpowers, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, I guess that's the easiest way to think about it. You mean like supernatural abilities and stuff like that?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Like throwing someone across the room without even touching them?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, no, I never heard about anything like that, but apparently he could read people's minds like it was nothing."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wow, really?"

name: Yuki
message: "I dunno. Don't you think it's true? At the very least, my dad definitely didn't want to fight him ever again."

name: Tomosane
message: "I guess so... I never knew."

name: Yuki
message: "And in the neighboring village, there was a priestess from Sanagi Shrine, with the blood of Sanami. The Mamiyas were the only family that would take someone like that."

name: Yuki
message: "The Mamiya family practiced the ancient techniques for hundreds of years to acquire their spiritual powers."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, really? I never knew."

name: Yuki
message: "So if you make your mom too mad, she might send zombies after you."

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you talking about zombies for?"

name: Yuki
message: "I dunno. I just thought it sounded cool."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't worry. There's no way that woman has any special powers."

name: Yuki
message: "I guess so."

name: Yuki
message: "But that's why the people from this village feared Sanami Kotomi like the plague."

name: Tomosane
message: "Like the plague?"

name: Yuki
message: "It just means they were really afraid of her. That's not all, though. Fear usually turns into violence, you know?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Violence? What do you mean?"

name: Yuki
message: "People often strike out at what they fear."

name: Tomosane
message: "Strike out?"

name: Yuki
message: "In other words, they discriminate."

name: Tomosane
message: "Discrimination? You mean like bullying?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, something like that. When a bunch of adults bully someone, it's called discrimination."

name: Tomosane
message: "When adults bully someone, huh? That's crazy."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, and that kind of bullying can really change someone when it's that bad. Especially at school and stuff."

name: Tomosane
message: "I see."

name: Yuki
message: "At that time, the only person who helped her was your father."

name: Tomosane
message: "My father..."

name: Yuki
message: "Your father was a really nice guy. He couldn't stand to see someone discriminated against because of some old superstition."

name: Tomosane
message: "Doesn't mean he had to marry her!"

name: Yuki
message: "No, no, at first he was just trying to be nice, but in the end the two fell in love."

name: Yuki
message: "So they eloped together to escape the persecution here in the village. And that's how you were born."

name: Tomosane
message: "I see. She was hated by the village people, so they ran away to Tokyo."

name: Tomosane
message: "I guess that's why the people around here kind of look at me funny."

name: Yuki
message: "The Mamiya family is well respected by the villagers. Besides, Hiroo-san was really smart and very nice. No one thinks less of you because you're his son."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hmm... I guess, but even if they liked one of my parents, they still hated the other one."

name: Tomosane
message: "But Hasaki is different. Hasaki doesn't have Mamiya blood in her veins."

name: Yuki
message: "Haa... So you think people from the village will discriminate against Hasaki?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't you?"

name: Yuki
message: "I wonder if people really believe in that stuff anymore."

name: Tomosane
message: "But I heard some people at the dojo talking. They said Hasaki is one of the Sanami."

name: Yuki
message: "But that's just a rumor, right? It's just people making idle chatter."

name: Tomosane
message: "I can still tell they have different feelings toward Hasaki, though."

name: Yuki
message: "Jeez... Okay, okay. I can't deny that."

name: Yuki
message: "Even if it's just an old superstition, some of the people in this village still haven't caught up with the times."

name: Yuki
message: "There aren't very many houses with cable television, and it takes over an hour to bike to the next village if I want to play at the community center."

name: Yuki
message: "If you don't have cable television, you can't watch Discovery or History. You can't get those channels unless you have cable."
That's all you care about?

name: Yuki
message: "Is there some kind of problem with Hasaki?"

name: Tomosane
message: "O-Of course there is. Do you think Hasaki deserves to get bullied too, just because she has Sanami blood?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Not at all. Of course I don't think that. I really like Hasaki."

name: Tomosane
message: "Then what're you gonna do?"

name: Yuki
message: "What do I need to do? There's no problem, right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "There is a problem! A big problem!"

name: Yuki
message: "I don't think there's a problem. She has a hero to save her if she gets in trouble, after all."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "From what I hear, there's a transforming action hero looking out for her. Do you know anything about him?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-You were listening?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, I heard most of it."

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-Yuki-nee! I never expected you to be an eavesdropper!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, come on. I wanted to say something, but it sounded like you were talking about something important. I didn't want to interrupt the conversation, you know?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki-nee, you, you..."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahaha, but it shouldn't be a problem, right?
No matter what happens here in the village, she will always have a hero to protect her, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "That said, I don't think you have anything to worry about it. No one from Sawai is going to try to hurt Hasaki. They might talk about her, but that's all."

name: Yuki
message: "This is modern Japan. Look, you can just go to Jasco if you want to buy something. They're not going to discriminate against a little girl just because of some old superstition."

name: Yuki
message: "Besides, I'm here for her, and so is my dad. There's the whole Mamiya family, too."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah..."

name: Yuki
message: "So don't worry about it."

name: Yuki
message: "You just have to do your part and look after her."

name: Tomosane
message: "All right."

name: Yuki
message: "All right, that's what I wanted to hear. Anyway, I'll see ya later, Tomosane!"
Yuki-nee really is an adult, huh?
Someday...
Someday, I want...

name: Tomosane
message: "I want to beat her."
That's right. She's like my rival―someone who I have to overcome because I'm a hero.
I felt tired from going to the beach, but I couldn't really sleep.
I guess I just sat on the shore and built sandcastles, so I wasn't actually all that tired.
I looked at the clock. It was past ten.
In the countryside, night comes early.
Back in Tokyo, there would still be plenty of lights on. But in this village, everything is dark by this time.

name: Tomosane
message: "My mother, huh?"
I had never heard anything about her life before.
I heard that she went to live with the Mamiya family when she was still a child, and then she eventually married their oldest son, my father.
But I never heard the reason why she was living with the Mamiyas before now.
I knew her maiden name was Sanami, but I hadn't heard the details.
I just heard a bunch of creepy rumors.
Her relationship with the fuckers at the White Lotus Association started there too.

name: Tomosane
message: "So she's descended from a shrine maiden that could lead the dead, huh?"
Just the atmosphere around her makes my skin crawl, so it's definitely fitting.

name: Tomosane
message: "But they say that those shrine maidens could control the dead."
That's nonsense.
If my mother could do that, she would've already killed me and Hasaki.
Especially me. She already tried to cut my throat once.
If she had those powers, she wouldn't need a knife.
She could just kill me with her special powers.
I looked at the ceiling.
The wood grain in the old house almost looked like a person's face.
It reminded me of my mother. It made me sick.

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hm?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh? Hasaki, what's wrong?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Um, can I sleep with you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, uh... I don't really care."

name: Hasaki
message: "I'm kind of... scared of sleeping alone."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh? Weren't you sleeping with Grandma?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, but I'd rather be with you."

name: Tomosane
message: "What for?"

name: Hasaki
message: "B-Because you're... you're my hero..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, I guess a hero wouldn't mind."

name: Tomosane
message: "All right, I'll go get another futon."

name: Hasaki
message: "I want to sleep in yours."

name: Tomosane
message: "My futon?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Can I?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, I guess I don't mind. There'll be more room if we get another, though."

name: Hasaki
message: "I don't want more room."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh? I don't get it... All right, come here."

name: Hasaki
message: "Sure."
Hasaki squeezed into my futon.

name: Tomosane
message: "Hm? What's that?"
I saw that she was holding something.

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, this? They're twin rabbit dolls."
Hasaki opened her hand, showing me the two small rabbit dolls in her hand.

name: Tomosane
message: "They look like something you would put on your phone. Do you always carry those around?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, I always have them in my pocket."
That's why they're dark black, I guess.

name: Hasaki
message: "Dad bought them for me."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wow... Dad bought 'em, huh?"

name: Hasaki
message: "He actually bought one for Takuji and one for me."

name: Hasaki
message: "Takuji Nii-san said he didn't want to have a toy like that, so he threw it away. I took it because he didn't want it."

name: Tomosane
message: "That sure sounds like him. He really gets on my nerves."
If I'd been there, I would've hit him right in the nose for that.

name: Hasaki
message: "No, thanks to him, I got two. They're twins, so they're happier together."

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, I guess if you don't mind..."
Two dolls.
Twin dolls, given to the twins Takuji and Hasaki.
That sounds like something Dad would think of.
But Takuji didn't want his.
Of course not. He resents the fact that he has a twin sister.
Of course he'd throw away his doll.

name: Hasaki
message: "What's wrong?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, uh... It's nothing."

name: Hasaki
message: "Today was fun."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's good to hear."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, and Yuki-san was really nice."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, she's a nice girl. She's a bit violent, though."

name: Hasaki
message: "Not really. You said that before, but she's not violent. She's super nice."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's just because you don't know her. She can be nice, but she's actually really mean."

name: Hasaki
message: "But she's so nice..."
My life here in the country, with Hasaki...
It's only supposed to last for the summer.
Once summer break is over, Hasaki will return to Tokyo.
Dad will get out of the hospital, and life will return to normal.
That was the plan.
Until we heard the news.
